collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (3 total Queries, 3 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT users.name, users.id, COUNT(shifts.id) as total_shifts FROM users LEFT JOIN shifts ON users.id = shifts.user_id AND shifts.start_time >= '2026-04-01 00:00:00' AND shifts.start_time <= '2026-04-30 23:59:59' WHERE users.role != 'admin' GROUP BY users.id ORDER BY total_shifts DESC

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT users.name, users.id, COUNT(shifts.id) as total_shifts FROM users LEFT JOIN shifts ON users.id = shifts.user_id AND shifts.start_time >= '2026-04-01 00:00:00' AND shifts.start_time <= '2026-04-30 23:59:59' WHERE users.role != 'admin' GROUP BY users.id ORDER BY total_shifts DESC
